# Wall HTML

> Turn any text into bold typographic screenshots via a simple API.

Wall HTML is a text-to-image screenshot API built on Cloudflare Workers. It renders text as a large typographic wall and returns a PNG screenshot.

## API Endpoints

### GET /screenshot-rest-url

Returns a PNG screenshot of the rendered text wall.

Parameters:
- `width` (required): Image width in pixels (e.g. 1080)
- `height` (required): Image height in pixels (e.g. 1920)
- `displayText` (required): The text to render
- `randomTextToggle` (optional): `true` to fill gaps with random characters, `false` for normal spacing
- `cutOffTextToggle` (optional): `true` to allow text to overflow edges, `false` to keep contained

Example: `GET /screenshot-rest-url?width=1080&height=1920&displayText=Hello+World&randomTextToggle=true&cutOffTextToggle=false`

Returns: `image/png`

### GET /text-background

Returns the raw HTML page with the typographic text wall (no screenshot).

Same parameters as `/screenshot-rest-url`.

### GET /health

Returns JSON health check status.
